notes: Reviewed with user: Codex-only skills are expected Codex/OMX local infrastructure. ~/.agent/skills/ entries are expected agentic-stack shared-brain skills and live at their canonical path (~/.agent/skills), not symlinked into ~/.claude/skills or ~/.codex/skills. Claude-only personal skills under ~/.claude/skills/ were baselined on 2026-06-03 to silence first-run drift noise; future weekly scans should surface only NEW additions. ~/.agents/ (plural) was retired on 2026-06-03 — its 17 remaining sc-* mirrors became redundant once ~/.codex/AGENTS.md gained a fallback rule pointing to ~/.claude/commands/<ns>/<name>.md.
